metadata.description: Deployment name prefix for all resources
Secondary region for Windows Server VMs
VM size for all virtual machines
Globally unique DNS name for Traffic Manager (auto-generated if not provided)
Source IP allowed through DNAT rule (use * for all or specific IP)
Object ID of the Entra ID user to assign VM Administrator Login role
Storage account URL for linux VM shell script

properties.description: Assign Virtual Machine Administrator Login role at RG scope

connectionInstructions.value: [concat('To connect to VMs: 1) RDP to Jump Box using FQDN or Public IP with credentials (Username: ', parameters('adminUsername'), '). 2) From Jump Box, open Remote Desktop Connection and connect to private VMs using their private IPs: Win11-VM1: ', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(variables('win11VMPrefix'), '1-', parameters('deploymentId'), '-nic'))).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, ', Win11-VM2: ', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(variables('win11VMPrefix'), '2-', parameters('deploymentId'), '-nic'))).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, ', WinServer-VM1: ', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(variables('winServerVMPrefix'), '1-', parameters('deploymentId'), '-nic'))).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, ', WinServer-VM2: ', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(variables('winServerVMPrefix'), '2-', parameters('deploymentId'), '-nic'))).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '. Use same admin credentials.')]
